
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 3. Replication projects**

| Project | Scope | Original | Replicated | Pass rate |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Open Science Collaboration [@collaboration2015] | 100 psych studies | r =0.403 | r =0.197 | 36% |
| Many Labs 2 [@klein2018] | 28 effects, 125 samples, N=15,305 | d =0.60 | d =0.15 | 50–54% |
| SSRP [@camerer2018] | 21 Nature/Science studies | — | ~50% of original | 62% |
| Exp. Economics RP [@camerer2016] | 18 AER/QJE lab studies | — | 66% of original | 61% |
| SCORE [@tyner2026] | 274 claims, 164 papers, 12 disciplines | r =0.25 | r =0.10 | 55% |
:::
